div.h1: Blocked Matrix Multiplication: Access Pattern (Intel Optimization Guide)

g.text: L1 Cache Memory Layout (32 KB Limit)

p.em: Status: No evictions during block inner-loop.
Improvement: Cache misses reduced from O(N³) to O(N³/B)

div.p: Size: B × B elements Access: row-wise Stride: 4 bytes
Size: B × B elements Access: row-wise (Optimized) Stride: 4 bytes
B-Matrix Access: Column-wise Stride: N × 4 bytes Cache Lines: 1 element per line Outcome: 100% Cache Thrashing
B-Matrix Access: Sequential Stride: 4 bytes (Contiguous) Cache Lines: 16 elements per line Outcome: Optimal Prefetching
